top_signals.title: Airbus Delays XLR Deliveries to IndiGo as War Hits Suppliers
top_signals.summary: Airbus SE is falling behind on deliveries of the A321XLR, a longer-range version of its most popular jet, with Indian customer IndiGo unlikely to receive the full batch of nine units this year, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Traders Fully Bet on Fed Rate Hike This Year After Jobs Data
top_signals.summary: Traders in the $31 trillion Treasuries market fully priced in a Federal Reserve interest-rate hike by the end of this year after US job growth topped all forecasts in May, spurring yields higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Franklin’s Western Asset Management agrees $100mn settlement with SEC
top_signals.summary: Agreement with Wall Street watchdog resolves investigation into one of fund manager’s star traders
